visuals.title: Simplified Unix Filesystem Hierarchy
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Simplified Unix Filesystem Hierarchy
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Unix File System Organization</text>

  <!-- Root Directory -->
  <rect x="180" y="60" width="60" height="30" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    / (root)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Main Directories -->
  <rect x="50" y="120" width="40" height="25" fill="#2196F3" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="70" y="137" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    bin
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="100" y="120" width="40" height="25" fill="#2196F3" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="120" y="137" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    etc
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="150" y="120" width="40" height="25" fill="#2196F3" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="170" y="137" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    home
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="200" y="120" width="40" height="25" fill="#2196F3" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="220" y="137" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    usr
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="250" y="120" width="40" height="25" fill="#2196F3" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="270" y="137" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    var
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="300" y="120" width="40" height="25" fill="#2196F3" rx="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="137" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    tmp
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Connection lines from root to directories -->
  <line x1="210" y1="90" x2="70" y2="120" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="90" x2="120" y2="120" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="90" x2="170" y2="120" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="90" x2="220" y2="120" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="90" x2="270" y2="120" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="90" x2="320" y2="120" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Home directory structure -->
  <rect x="130" y="180" width="40" height="25" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="150" y="197" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    user1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="180" y="180" width="40" height="25" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="200" y="197" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    user2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="230" y="180" width="40" height="25" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="250" y="197" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    user3
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Connection from home to users -->
  <line x1="170" y1="145" x2="150" y2="180" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="170" y1="145" x2="200" y2="180" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="170" y1="145" x2="250" y2="180" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- User directories -->
  <rect x="100" y="230" width="50" height="20" fill="#90CAF9" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="125" y="244" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Documents
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="160" y="230" width="40" height="20" fill="#90CAF9" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="180" y="244" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Music
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="210" y="230" width="40" height="20" fill="#90CAF9" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="230" y="244" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="8" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Videos
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Connection from user to directories -->
  <line x1="150" y1="205" x2="125" y2="230" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="150" y1="205" x2="180" y2="230" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="150" y1="205" x2="230" y2="230" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

</svg>
